title: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) Earnings Dates & Report
text: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) Earnings Information. Earnings Calendar: Seeking Alpha provides comprehensive earnings calendars and reports for WOOF. Next Earnings Date: May 27, 2026. Historical Earnings: The company has reported quarterly earnings results across multiple years with varying degrees of beat/miss on consensus estimates. Earnings Transcripts: Full earnings call transcripts are available for review, providing detailed management commentary and analyst Q&A. Recent Trends: Over the past 2-3 years, the company has shown improved consistency in beating revenue estimates, though profitability improvements have been the key story. Analyst Commentary: Professional analysts track the company and provide detailed analysis of earnings results and forward guidance. The consensus has shifted more positive as the company demonstrates execution on its turnaround plan. Stock Reaction: Market reaction to earnings has varied, with positive reactions to profitability guidance and free cash flow generation despite modest revenue trends.
